articles.title: Argentina races to find origins of cruise ship hantavirus outbreak, amid reports some passengers have returned to US
articles.description:
Argentina, where the MV Hondius cruise departed, consistently ranked by WHO as having highest incidence of hantavirus in region
Officials and experts in Argentina are scrambling to determine if their country is the source of a deadly hantavirus outbreak that has gripped an Atlantic cruise ship, amid reports that a number of passengers have already returned to their home countries.
Argentina, where the cruise to Antarctica departed, is consistently ranked by the World Health Organization (WHO) as having the highest incidence of the rare, rodent-borne disease in Latin America. Investigators there are working to contact trace the source of contamination.
 Continue reading...

articles.title: Musk’s biggest loyalist became his biggest liability
articles.description:
I sat down in the Musk v. Altman trial courtroom today, painfully aware that no one was going to ask Shivon Zilis the question on everyone's minds: Girl, what the fuck are you doing?
Zilis, who testified under oath that she is the mother of four of Musk's children, was… what's the best way to characterize this? A Musk advisor? She denies she was a "chief of staff" but says she worked for Musk's "entire AI portfolio: Tesla, Neuralink, and OpenAI" starting in 2017. The two met through OpenAI, and they had what she referred to as a "one off" before becoming "friends and colleagues." The "one off," she confirmed, was "romantic in nature."
Her  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

articles.title: Nintendo announces a new Star Fox for the Switch 2
articles.description:
It turns out Fox McCloud's appearance in the Super Mario Galaxy Movie was a tease of things to come: Nintendo just surprise announced the first new Star Fox game in a decade. The game is called, simply, Star Fox, and it's out very soon, launching on June 25th.
Nintendo says that it's "based" on the classic space shooter Star Fox 64, but with redesigned characters and upgraded visuals. Essentially, it sounds like a modern remake of the game with the same level design. Based on the first look at the game, it looks thoroughly modern, with incredibly detailed characters, including a surprisingly realistic Slippy Toad. And yes, the in-ship bante …
Read the full story at The Verge.

articles.title: Botched US Blacklist Highlights Frail Trump-Xi Truce
articles.description: As President Trump prepares to meet his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping, some long-standing tensions remain. Among them are the Pentagon's curbs on Chinese companies that could pose national security risks. Bloomberg's Kate O'Keeffe explains why this blacklist matters.  (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Silence, the court is in session
articles.description: The resignation of Allahabad High Court judge Yashwant Varma last month, amid parliamentary proceedings to remove him over allegations that burnt wads of unaccounted cash were found at his Delhi residence in 2025, has brought into focus how the judiciary holds itself to account. Aaratrika Bhaumik reports on the opacity surrounding complaints against judges, the routine rejection of information requests, and the shrinking space for criticism

articles.title: Chipmaker Silex Microsystems Shares Soar in Stockholm Debut
articles.description: Silex Microsystems AB surged in its first day of trading on Nasdaq Stockholm after an initial public offering that raised about 2 billion Swedish kronor ($220 million) for the specialist microchip-maker and its Chinese shareholder Sai MicroElectronics Inc.

articles.title: PM to visit Bengaluru on May 10 to address 45th anniversary of Art of Living; BJP to offer reception at HAL airport
articles.description: As this is the first visit of the PM to Karnataka after elections to five State Assemblies, the BJP State unit is gearing up to accord a reception on his arrival at the HAL airport for the party’s victory in West Bengal, Assam, and Puducherry

dailyNews.title: Argentina races to find origins of cruise ship hantavirus outbreak, amid reports some passengers have returned to US
dailyNews.description:
Argentina, where the MV Hondius cruise departed, consistently ranked by WHO as having highest incidence of hantavirus in region
Officials and experts in Argentina are scrambling to determine if their country is the source of a deadly hantavirus outbreak that has gripped an Atlantic cruise ship, amid reports that a number of passengers have already returned to their home countries.
Argentina, where the cruise to Antarctica departed, is consistently ranked by the World Health Organization (WHO) as having the highest incidence of the rare, rodent-borne disease in Latin America. Investigators there are working to contact trace the source of contamination.
 Continue reading...

dailyNews.title: Trump pauses Project Freedom, calls Iran conflict a "skirmish"
dailyNews.description: President Trump touted U.S. actions against Iran on Wednesday. The comments came one day after he paused the Project Freedom initiative to guide ships through the Strait of Hormuz to allow peace negotiations to move forward. CBS News' Holly Williams reports, and Samuel Helfont, an associate professor of strategy and policy at the Naval War College, has more.

dailyNews.title: Todd Blanche says claims of Justice Department politicization are "simply false"
dailyNews.description: Critics have expressed concerns about President Trump's use of the Justice Department, including former President Barack Obama during a taped interview on "The Late Show with Stephen Colbert." CBS News immigration correspondent Camilo Montoya-Galvez sat down for an exclusive interview with acting Attorney General Todd Blanche, who defended the Justice Department's actions.

dailyNews.title: Republicans propose $1 billion in taxpayer money for Trump's ballroom
dailyNews.description: NBC News' Peter Nicholas joins "Here's the Scoop" to report on a new reconciliation bill proposed by Republicans that would allocate $1 billion in taxpayer money to go towards “security adjustments and upgrades" for President Trump's ballroom and East Wing renovation.

dailyNews.title: Japan's Nikkei 225 tops 62,000 for the first time as Asia markets look past Trump’s Iran threats

dailyNews.description: The message from Indiana’s Republican primaries was hard to miss: if you cross Trump -- even in a state legislative race -- he’s willing to come after you politically.

dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
